ops.body: Done. wire (Framing/Peer/Ladder/Server tenant-fair pooling, client outcome taxonomy, lifeproto v1 goldens) + daemon shell (Takeover/EnsureCurrent/SkewWatch/IdleExit/StateFile) + trust (DR-pinned Policy.Check via purego LOCAL_PEERTOKEN + Security.framework, fail-closed, E2E-verified against 4 real signed fixtures incl. RSS-flat leak regression). Review findings (cross-tenant starvation, state-file byte preservation, shutdown stall, read-error propagation) all fixed and mutation-tested. Evidence: CI green on 691914dd33a7 — https://github.com/yasyf/daemonkit/actions/runs/29621164143 (every job, swift included).
